boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: generator load transfer.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current dispatch order and equipment status match

critical_features_preserved: current dispatch order and equipment status match
final_answer: Source records confirm dependency match and close the generator load transfer boundary. Actor scope date and action match exactly per control record. Action may proceed without defect.
